# DevCheap — Developer Deals & Discounts

> Curated deals, discounts, and free tiers for developers. Updated daily with verified listings across cloud, AI, DevOps, databases, and more.

DevCheap tracks **209 deals** across **22 categories**. Every deal is manually reviewed, rated (1-10), and categorized. All deals include pricing, expiration dates, coupon codes, and affiliate tracking where available.

## Featured
- [Homepage — Browse All Deals](https://devcheap.click/): All active deals with filtering, search, and pagination
- [Archive — Expired & Lower-Rated Deals](https://devcheap.click/archive.html): Historical deals kept for reference
- [Raw Deal Data (JSONL)](https://devcheap.click/data/deals.jsonl): Full dataset for programmatic consumption

## Quick Stats
- Total deals: **209**
- Categories: **22**
- Top-rated deals (≥ 8.0): **17**
- Expired deals: **169**
- Pricing: free: 163, lifetime: 31, paid: 10, trial: 5
- Last updated: 2026-07-23

## How to Use This Site
- **Browse**: Visit the [homepage](https://devcheap.click/) to see all active deals. Use category buttons and search to filter.
- **Detail pages**: Each deal has a dedicated page at `https://devcheap.click/deals/{id}/` with full description, pricing, coupon code, and affiliate tracking.
- **Coupon codes**: If a deal has a coupon code, it is shown on the detail page. Click "Copy Code" to copy it to clipboard.
- **Affiliate links**: Some deals use affiliate links (marked with tracking_id) to support the site. These are always disclosed.
- **Ratings**: Each deal is rated 1-10. Deals ≥ 8.0 are featured on the homepage. Deals < 8.0 are moved to the [archive](https://devcheap.click/archive.html).
- **RSS**: Subscribe to [feed.xml](https://devcheap.click/feed.xml) for deal updates.
- **Data access**: Full dataset at [data/deals.jsonl](https://devcheap.click/data/deals.jsonl) (one JSON object per line).

## Content Negotiation
- This site supports content negotiation via the `Accept` header.
- Request `Accept: text/markdown` to receive a clean markdown version of any page.
- The `Vary: Accept` header is set on all responses to ensure proper caching.
- Structured data is available via JSON-LD in the HTML `<head>`.

## About
- **Site**: [devcheap.click](https://devcheap.click/)
- **Deal count**: 209
- **Categories**: 22
- **Content**: Deals are added and updated continuously. Each deal has a dedicated detail page with description, pricing, coupon code, and affiliate link.
- **Pricing types**: free, lifetime, paid, trial
